source.notes: Provided by user from track-piece inspection/tracing.
source.imageEvidenceNotes: IMG_5354.png shows both curve families and a complete straight with red traced lane dividers and section marks. It confirms straight 3-space lanes, 90-degree curves with 2/3/4-space lane groups, and 60-degree bends with 3/4/5-space lane groups.

straight.description: Straight track section with 8 lanes and 3 movement sections per lane. No printed speed restriction.

curve30to60.description: Tight 90-degree corner. Speed limits increase from the inside lane toward the outside lanes. Outer lanes contain more movement sections because they travel a longer distance.

curve50to80.description: Fast sweeping 60-degree bend. Higher permitted speeds than the 30-60 corner. Outer lanes provide five movement sections and support higher speeds.

implementationConventions.laneNumbering: lane 1 is inner on curves; lane 8 is outer on curves
implementationConventions.curveVehicleSafetyLimit: Use the lower printed speed limit of the two occupied lanes.
implementationConventions.curveVehicleSectionCount: Use the larger section count of the two occupied lanes so outer-lane movement can use the longer path.
